phase0_notes: Kinds below are the deployment-guide §1.3 taxonomy seeded as a baseline. A future Phase 0 taxonomy-discovery LLM should propose a game-specific refinement of this list, and a human must flip `human_approved` to true before Phase 1 ingest runs in production.

item.description: A craftable, equippable, or consumable object. Required sub-fields: stats, requirements, tags. Subtypes: weapon, armor, consumable, resource.

skill.description: An ability triggered by a unit or building. Required sub-fields: cost, cooldown, effects, scaling. Subtypes: active, passive.

enemy.description: A hostile entity the player fights. Required sub-fields: stats, loot_table, ai_profile, resistances.

mechanic.description: A self-contained piece of game logic — damage formula, status effect, resource transformation. Required sub-fields: formula, inputs, outputs, edge_cases.

location.description: A named map, region, or sub-area with distinct rules or content.

npc.description: A non-hostile named character (vendor, quest-giver, story figure).

quest.description: An objective-driven mission. Required sub-fields: prerequisites, objectives, rewards, flags_set.

system.description: A meta-system that coordinates other entities — crafting, economy, leveling, day-night cycle. Required sub-fields: controlled_entities, state_transitions.

concept.description: Catch-all for content that doesn't fit a typed kind yet. Routed to vault/concepts/ and flagged for human re-classification.
